calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
David Leeds, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Chubb Custom Insurance Company, a corporation.
No appearance by the Defendants: Percy Mouton and Betty Mouton.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Principal $37,882.90
Interest $3,893.52
Costs $457.300, for a total of $42,233.42
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admitted The First Set Of Request For Admissions Served On Defendant Betty Mouton And Request For Sanctions;Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Declaration Of David A. Leeds; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Chubb Custom Insurance Company's motion to deem certain matters admitted as to defendants Betty Mouton is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's first set of requests for admissions are deemed admitted. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
